hero.subtitle: PsyMind.AI is your companion for High School and College exams. Organize your routine, control anxiety and achieve your goals with AI support.

about.title: About the Project
about.subtitle: A commitment to mental health and academic success.
about.p1: PsyMind.AI was born from the vision that cutting-edge technology should be an ally for students' emotional health. Combining advanced artificial intelligence with consolidated pedagogical practices, we offer a safe harbor for personal development.

mission.title: Mission
mission.desc: Empower students with self-knowledge and productivity tools.

vision.title: Vision
vision.desc: To be the gold standard in AI-based educational emotional support.

client_side.mitigation: Study of P2P integration or Sync via Encrypted Cloud.

gemini_api.advantage: Elite natural language processing without fixed costs.
gemini_api.mitigation: Implementation of text streaming and robust retry logic.

ts_strict.mitigation: Zero use of 'any' to ensure self-sustaining code.

context_api.disadvantage: Risk of unnecessary re-renders at large scale.

contrast.title: High Contrast
contrast.desc: Themes optimized for users with low vision or photosensitivity.

keyboard.title: Keyboard Navigation
keyboard.desc: Clear visual focus and intuitive shortcuts for mouse-free navigation.

screen_reader.title: Screen Readers
screen_reader.desc: Rigorous HTML5 semantics and ARIA attributes for a fluid auditory experience.

tech_stack.title: Tech Stack
tech_stack.subtitle: Built with the best tools of the modern ecosystem.

modules.title: Modules & Features
modules.subtitle: An integrated platform for emotional support and study organization.

psybot.title: PsyBot Tutor
psybot.desc: Interactive assistant that tracks your learning path with emotional feedback.

vocational.title: Vocational Test
vocational.desc: AI-based multidimensional analysis to guide your career choice.

insights.title: Meta-insights
insights.desc: Visualize mood and productivity patterns for decisions based on personal data.

study_focus.title: Study Focus
study_focus.description: Organization tips and personalized schedules for national and college exams.

anxiety_control.title: Anxiety Control
anxiety_control.description: Breathing and mindfulness techniques to stay calm before tests and essays.

always_available.title: Available 24/7
always_available.description: Ask questions, vent or ask for study tips at any time of day or night.

gemini.title: Powered by Google Gemini
gemini.description: PsyMind.AI uses <1>Google Gemini 1.5 Flash</1>, a next-generation AI model, to offer empathetic and scientifically grounded answers.

api.title: Gemini API
api.description: Direct integration with the Google Gemini API for natural and contextualized conversations.

notebooklm.title: NotebookLM
notebooklm.description: Prompt engineering developed with NotebookLM, based on educational psychology studies.

gems.title: Gemini Gems
gems.description: Personality and tone of voice optimized through Gems for teenage emotional support.

education.title: Educational Focus
education.description: PsyMind.AI isn't just a chat, it's a journey companion for <1>Middle and High School</1> students.

stress.title: Stress Management
stress.description: Support to deal with the pressure of exams, mock tests and career choices.

mentoring.title: College Mentoring
mentoring.description: Strategic guidance for national and main college exams, keeping focus on results.

self_knowledge.title: Self-knowledge
self_knowledge.description: Tools that help in discovering vocations and emotional maturation.

license.title: Transparency and Open Source
license.description: PsyMind.AI is an <1>Open Source</1> project, which means its technology is accessible and auditable by everyone.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: You know exactly how your data is handled, ensuring greater security and trust.

community.title: Community
community.description: Developers, educators and students can collaborate to continuously evolve the platform.

education_code.title: Education
education_code.description: The source code serves as free study material for anyone who wants to learn programming and AI.

license.terms: Distributed under the <1>Creative Commons BY-SA 4.0</1> license, allowing sharing and adaptation with appropriate credit.

q1.question: Does PsyMind.AI replace a psychologist?
q1.answer: No. PsyMind.AI is an educational tool for emotional support and study organization. It does not offer clinical diagnoses nor replace the monitoring of mental health professionals.

q2.question: How does AI help my study routine?
q2.answer: Our AI uses canonical techniques such as Active Recall and Spaced Repetition to optimize your learning, in addition to helping identify signs of burnout and suggesting strategic breaks.

q3.question: Is my data and conversation private?
q3.answer: Yes. We prioritize privacy. You can use the chat anonymously and have full control over your chat history and telemetry data.
